data.title: Board of Ball Corporation declared a 20-cent per share cash dividend, payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026.
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado on January 28, 2026, Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) announced a cash dividend of 20 cents per share. The dividend will be paid on March 16, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 2, 2026. In addition, Ball Corporation will disclose further details during an upcoming conference call.

data.title: Oil States signs new $125m credit agreement with $75m credit facility and $50m term loan, available till July 2026. Wells Fargo serves as administrative agent.
data.description: Oil States International, Inc. revealed a new credit agreement today in Houston. The "Cash Flow Credit Agreement" includes $125 million in total commitments. This consists of a $75 million revolving credit facility and a $50 million multi-draw term loan facility. The funds will be accessible for draw until July 28, 2026. Wells Fargo Bank, National Association is serving as the administrative agent for this agreement.

data.title: Assurant (NYSE: AIZ) appoints Lynn Blake to Board of Directors, effective Jan 28, 2026. Former State Street Investment Management EVP joins.
data.description: Assurant, Inc., a renowned global protection company, has appointed Lynn Blake, former Executive VP and Chief Investment Officer at State Street Investment Management, to its Board of Directors. Effective January 28, 2026, Blake will join the board, bringing her expertise in Global Equity Beta Solutions. Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ) specializes in safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, and automobiles in collaboration with top brands worldwide. This strategic addition enhances the company's finance and risk oversight.

data.title: StoneX Group Inc. will announce 2026 Q1 earnings on Feb 4, with a conference call on Feb 5 at 9am ET.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to take place on February 5, 2026, at 9:00 am Eastern Time.

data.title: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. to start trading Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants separately from Feb. 2, 2026; 17.25M units in IPO.
data.description: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. disclosed that participants in the initial public offering recently held comprised a total of 17,250,000 units, with 2,250,000 units from the underwriters' exercise. The company, listed as Nasdaq: BLRKU, made the announcement on Jan. 28, 2026.

data.title: PenFed Credit Union's earnings, capital, and liquidity grew in 2025 with $2.9 billion net worth.
data.description: PenFed Credit Union, a prominent federal credit union in the United States, holds a net worth exceeding $2.9 billion. Based in TYSONS, Va., as of January 28, 2026, the credit union highlighted its strong financial position, solid earnings growth, and ample liquidity.
COLOMBIA AIRLINE SATENA SAYS 15 KILLED IN PLANE CRASH - STATEMENT

data.title: Exco Technologies Limited reported Q1 results for December 31, 2025, with a dividend of $0.105 per share to be paid on March 31, 2026.
data.description: Exco Technologies Limited (TSX-XTC) released its first quarter results for the period ended December 31, 2025. Alongside this announcement, the company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.105 per common share. Shareholders of record on March 17, 2026, will receive the dividend on March 31, 2026. This dividend qualifies as an “eligible dividend” under the Income Tax Act of Canada.

data.title: Bitcoin supporters and cypherpunks turn on Trump after Minneapolis shooting, in which Alex Pretti was killed, prompting backlash against the White House.
data.description: Following the tragic killing of Alex Pretti, certain figures within the cryptocurrency sector are openly separating themselves from President Trump due to his response to the incident. This move comes as a result of concerns raised over the White House's statements regarding the matter.

data.title: Securitize & Cantor Equity Partners II file registration statement Form S-4. World's leading asset tokenizing platform.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Securitize, Inc., the top platform globally for tokenizing real-world assets, announced a partnership with Cantor Equity Partners II, Inc. (Nasdaq: CEPT), a special purpose acquisition company. This collaboration signifies a significant move in the industry.

data.title: Empire State Realty Trust (NYSE: ESRT) reveals 2025 tax treatment of Class A common stock distributions, consult tax advisor.
data.description: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. disclosed the 2025 tax treatment for its Class A common stock (NYSE: ESRT) distributions. The cash distributions to stockholders in 2025 will be categorized for income tax purposes. Stockholders should refer to Form 1099-DIV box numbers for details. It is advisable for stockholders to seek guidance from their tax advisors for specific information regarding their individual tax situations.

data.title: Haig Partners advised on the sale of Toyota of Lincoln Park in Chicago, previously owned by AutoCanada, to Murgado Automotive Group.
data.description: In a recent transaction in Chicago, Illinois, Haig Partners LLC served as the exclusive sell-side advisor for the sale of Toyota of Lincoln Park. The dealership, previously owned by AutoCanada's U.S. subsidiary, Leader Automotive Group, was acquired by Murgado Automotive Group. Kevin Nill from Haig Partners expressed satisfaction with the deal and stated, "We were pleased to facilitate the sale of Toyota of Lincoln Park to Mario Murgado." This sale represents a significant move in the auto retail sector in the U.S.

data.title: Noble Corp. sells 5 jackup rigs to Borr Drilling for $360 million, generating $210 million in cash.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Noble Corporation plc disclosed the successful sale of five jackup rigs to Borr Drilling Limited for a total of $360 million. Through this transaction, Noble Corporation plc gained around $210 million in cash.

data.title: Data breach at The Phia Group in July 2024 exposed personal info. Incident discovered on July 9, 2024.
data.description: In Canton, Massachusetts, on January 28, 2026, The Phia Group reported a potential data security breach involving personal information. The incident took place between July 8 and July 9, 2024. It was discovered on July 9, 2024.

data.title: Demand for personalized skincare rising - Laser by Aleya caters to Gen Z, millennial clients seeking smarter, simpler solutions.
data.description: In a recent press release dated January 28, 2026, located in Great Neck, NY, Laser by Aleya announced its decision to broaden its consultation services in response to the growing demand for customized skincare solutions. This move reflects a trend where an increasing number of clients prefer tailored and low-maintenance skincare approaches. The company is observing heightened interest from both Generation Z and millennial clients, signaling a shift towards more personalized skincare routines.

data.title: Hawthorn Bancshares reports Q4 net income of $6.2M ($0.90/share) and $23.8M ($3.43/share) for 2025.
data.description: In Jefferson City, Missouri, on January 28, 2026, Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: HWBK), the parent company of Hawthorn Bank, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The Company reported a net income of $6.2 million for the quarter, translating to earnings per diluted share (EPS) of $0.90. For the entire year ending on December 31, 2025, Hawthorn Bancshares reported a net income of $23.8 million, resulting in an EPS of $3.43.

data.title: Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. announces a $0.22 monthly dividend per share for February, March, April, etc.
data.description: Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. (NYSE: PDCC, PDPA) headquartered in New York and London, declared a regular monthly dividend for the upcoming months. The Board of Directors approved a dividend of $0.22 per share on the Company's common stock. This dividend applies to shareholders for the months of February, March, April, and more to follow.

data.title: WM reports Q4 revenue of $6.3 billion, up from $5.9 billion in Q4 2024, and full-year revenue of $25 billion.
data.description: WM (NYSE: WM) revealed their financial outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter, revenue stood at $6.313 billion, demonstrating growth compared to $5.893 billion in the same quarter of the previous year. For the full year ending December 31, 2025, revenue reached $25 million. Please note that all figures are presented in millions unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) will release Q4 & Year End 2025 earnings on Feb 23, 2026, followed by conference call on Feb 24, 2026 at 9am CT (10am ET). Webcast link: https://ir.atlas.energy/.
data.description: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) based in Austin, Texas, will release its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 earnings after the market closes on Monday, February 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss financial and operational results will be held at 9:00am Central Time (10:00am Eastern Time) on Tuesday, February 24, 2026. A live webcast can be accessed at https://ir.atlas.energy/. Participants are encouraged to join the webcast at least 10 minutes prior to the start time.

data.title: Meta stock rises on Q4 earnings beat with $59.89B revenue, $8.88 EPS, 24% YoY revenue growth, 7% DAUs increase, 18% ad impressions rise and 40% expenses surge.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) released their Q4 financial results after the market closed on Wednesday. They reported revenue of $59.89 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $58.30 billion. Adjusted earnings were $8.88 per share, exceeding estimates of $8.16 per share. Total revenue saw a 24% increase compared to the previous year. Family daily active users grew by 7% year-over-year to reach 3.58 billion. Ad impressions rose by 18% year-over-year, with the average price per ad increasing by 6%. The operating margin was 41%, lower than the 48% from the same quarter in the prior year. Costs and expenses went up by 40% year-over-year to $35.15 billion. The Meta Platforms stock is currently trading in a narrow range. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
